old_example: The health store sells a variety of herbal remedies for common ailments like insomnia and digestive issues.
new_example: The health store sells a variety of herbal remedies for ailments.
new_translation: Cửa hàng sức khỏe bán nhiều loại dược liệu thảo mộc cho bệnh tật.

old_example: I hereby declare that all the information provided in this application form is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
new_example: I hereby declare that all information provided is true and accurate.
new_translation: Tôi bằng cách này tuyên bố mọi thông tin cung cấp là đúng.

old_example: The city is proud of its rich cultural heritage and has many museums and historical monuments.
new_example: The city is proud of its heritage and many historical monuments.
new_translation: Thành phố tự hào về di sản và các di tích lịch sử.

old_example: The firefighter was hailed as a local hero after saving the child from the fire.
new_example: The firefighter was hailed as a local hero today.
new_translation: Người lính cứu hỏa đã được ca ngợi là anh hùng địa phương hôm nay.

old_example: The firefighters were praised for their heroic efforts in rescuing several people from the burning apartment building.
new_example: The firefighters were praised for their heroic efforts in the rescue.
new_translation: Các lính cứu hỏa đã được khen ngợi vì những nỗ lực anh hùng.

old_example: The blue laptop on the desk is mine, and the silver one is hers.
new_example: The blue laptop is mine, and the silver one is hers.
new_translation: Chiếc máy tính xanh là của tôi, và chiếc bạc là của cô ấy.

old_example: She taught herself how to code by watching online tutorials and practicing every day.
new_example: She taught herself how to code by watching online tutorials daily.
new_translation: Cô ấy đã tự học lập trình bằng cách xem bài hướng dẫn hàng ngày.

old_example: After a brief moment of hesitation, she decided to accept the job offer and move to another city for the new opportunity.
new_example: After a brief hesitation, she decided to accept the job offer.
new_translation: Sau một thoáng do dự, cô ấy đã chấp nhận lời mời làm việc.

old_example: The police finally discovered the gang's secret hideout in an abandoned warehouse on the outskirts of the city.
new_example: The police discovered the gang's hideout in an abandoned warehouse.
new_translation: Cảnh sát đã khám phá ra nơi ẩn náu trong nhà kho bỏ hoang.
